panels.text: In a world where demons roam freely...

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: I'll protect this village, no matter what!

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: You can't do it alone, Kaito.
The ground shook as the beast appeared.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Thanks, Yuki. I owe you one.

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: We need to fall back. This area is sealed off.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: No. I made a promise to the elder.

panels.speaker: Yuki
panels.text: A promise won't mean anything if you're dead!
The silence between them was deafening.

panels.speaker: Kaito
panels.text: Then stay close. We finish this together.
